text: No item that is a polygon with seven sides is a square. There are no triangles which are polygons with seven sides. Thus, a portion of triangles are not squares.

premise1.subject: polygon with seven sides
premise1.raw_text: No item that is a polygon with seven sides is a square

premise2.subject: triangle
premise2.raw_text: There are no triangles which are polygons with seven sides

conclusion.subject: triangle
conclusion.raw_text: Thus, a portion of triangles are not squares
